metadata.title: Dentist in Guadalajara | Dr. Alondra Robles - Cosmetic Dentistry
metadata.description: Private dental clinic of Dr. Alondra Robles in Guadalajara, Mexico. Cosmetic dentistry, teeth whitening, implants and orthodontics. Book your appointment via WhatsApp.

hero.subtitle: Dr. Alondra Robles provides personalized excellence in dental care in a warm and professional environment. Your oral health in the best hands.

about.label: (About me)
about.title: Experience and Warmth in Every Visit
about.description: Dr. Alondra Robles specializes in aesthetic and restorative dentistry. Her personalized approach and use of cutting-edge technology guarantee exceptional results and satisfied patients.

services.title: Our Dental Services
services.description: Dr. Alondra Robles offers a wide range of personalized dental treatments to ensure your comfort and the best results.

cavityProtection.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
cavityProtection.description: Teeth whitening, porcelain veneers, and smile design. Transform your image with personalized treatments tailored to your needs.

rootCanal.title: Endodontics
rootCanal.description: Root canal treatments with advanced technology and minimal invasion. We save your natural teeth with painless procedures.

oralSurgery.title: Dental Implants
oralSurgery.description: Recover your smile with state-of-the-art implants. Implant placement with quality guarantee and lasting results.

works.label: (our work)
works.title: Real Transformations
works.description: Discover some of Dr. Alondra Robles' successful cases. Every smile is unique and deserves specialized care.

consultation.label: (first consultation)
consultation.title: Professional First Consultation
consultation.description: Investment in your dental health with personalized care and a treatment plan tailored to you.
consultation.detailedDescription: On your first visit Dr. Alondra Robles performs a complete diagnosis, periodontal evaluation and a personalized treatment plan. Your dental health is my priority.

testimonials.title: What Our Patients Say
testimonials.description: Discover why thousands of patients trust Dr. Alondra Robles with the care of their smile.

location.label: (find us)
location.title: VISIT OUR OFFICE
location.description: Private practice located in an accessible area with parking available. Schedule your appointment and visit to experience the best personalized dental care.

metadata.title: Teeth Whitening in Guadalajara | Dr. Alondra Robles
metadata.description: Transform your smile with our professional teeth whitening. Up to 4 shades lighter in a single session. Book your free consultation.

hero.subtitle: Transform your smile in just 45 minutes with our professional teeth whitening. Visible results from the first session.

benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.title: Why choose our whitening?
benefits.subtitle: Cutting-edge technology combined with Dr. Alondra Robles' experience to give you the best results.
benefits.fastDesc: Just 45 minutes and you'll see immediate results. Perfect for busy people.
benefits.safeDesc: Approved procedure that does not damage tooth enamel or gums.
benefits.longLastingDesc: Results that last up to 2 years with proper care.
benefits.personalizedDesc: We adjust the intensity according to your needs and sensitivity.
benefits.guaranteedDesc: Satisfaction guaranteed or your money back.

process.label: Process
process.title: How does it work?
process.subtitle: A simple, safe and effective process in just 4 steps
process.step1Desc: Initial evaluation of your smile and discussion of your goals.
process.step2Desc: We protect your gums and lips before applying the whitening gel.
process.step3Desc: We apply the gel and activate it with state-of-the-art LED light.
process.step4Desc: We reveal your new smile up to 4 shades lighter.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Investment in your smile
pricing.subtitle: An affordable price for a complete smile transformation

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: We answer your questions about teeth whitening

questions.a: No, the procedure is completely painless. Some patients may experience slight sensitivity after treatment, but this disappears within 24-48 hours.
Results can last between 1 and 2 years, depending on your habits. Avoiding coffee, tea, red wine and tobacco helps keep your smile white.

questions.q: Is it safe for tooth enamel?
questions.a: Yes, our whitening is 100% safe for enamel when performed by professionals. We use approved products and techniques that protect your enamel.

questions.q: Can I whiten if I have braces?
questions.a: Braces must be removed before whitening. Implants do not whiten, so we recommend coordinating the color with previous treatment.

questions.q: How many sessions do I need?
questions.a: Most patients achieve excellent results with just one 45-minute session. For deep stains, we might recommend a second session.
During the first 48 hours it's advisable to avoid foods and drinks that stain (coffee, tea, wine). We will provide you with a specific care kit.

finalCta.title: Ready for your new smile?
finalCta.subtitle: Book your free evaluation consultation today. Dr. Alondra Robles will evaluate your case and recommend the best treatment.

metadata.title: Dental Crowns in Guadalajara | Dr. Alondra Robles
metadata.description: Restore the shape, function and aesthetics of your teeth with porcelain and zirconium dental crowns. Custom-made for natural and lasting results.

hero.subtitle: Custom-made dental crowns crafted by Dr. Alondra Robles. They restore the shape, function and aesthetics of damaged teeth with results indistinguishable from a natural tooth.

benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.title: Why choose our dental crowns?
benefits.subtitle: We restore the strength, function and aesthetics of your teeth with high-quality materials and a fully personalized finish.
benefits.fastDesc: Each crown is designed in a personalized way for a precise fit from the first try.
benefits.safeDesc: Materials such as zirconium and porcelain fully compatible with your gums.
benefits.longLastingDesc: Crowns that last 10-15 years or more with proper care.
benefits.personalizedDesc: Personalized color and shape to integrate perfectly with your smile.
benefits.painlessDesc: Procedure under local anesthesia, completely comfortable and controlled.
benefits.guaranteedDesc: Warranty on the work and materials used in each crown.

process.label: Process
process.title: How does it work?
process.subtitle: A precise and comfortable process in 4 steps
process.step1Desc: We evaluate the affected tooth and plan the ideal treatment.
process.step2Desc: Minimal tooth shaping and high-precision impression taking.
process.step3Desc: We design and manufacture your crown in a specialized dental laboratory.
process.step4Desc: We place your definitive crown with a perfect fit and final review.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Investment in your smile
pricing.subtitle: High-quality dental crowns with premium materials and a custom-made finish
pricing.note: Starting from - Price varies by material

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: We answer your questions about dental crowns

questions.q: How long do dental crowns last?
questions.a: Modern zirconium or porcelain crowns can last between 10 and 15 years, and even longer with good hygiene and periodic check-ups. Some cases exceed 20 years of service life.

questions.q: Which material is best for my crown?
questions.a: It depends on the tooth and the aesthetic result sought. Zirconium crowns are ideal for their strength and aesthetics; porcelain crowns stand out on front teeth for their natural translucency. During the consultation we evaluate your case and recommend the most suitable material.
No. We apply local anesthesia before shaping the tooth and the entire process is comfortable. You may feel mild sensitivity in the first days, but it goes away soon.

questions.q: How many visits do I need?
questions.a: Generally 2 visits: the first to prepare the tooth and take the impression, the second to cement the definitive crown. Between visits you will wear a temporary crown.
Between 7 and 10 business days. We work with a trusted dental laboratory that guarantees precision and quality in every crown.

questions.q: Can I eat normally with a crown?
questions.a: Yes, once the definitive crown is cemented you can eat normally. We recommend avoiding biting very hard objects (ice, pens, nails) to extend its lifespan.

finalCta.title: Ready to restore your smile?
finalCta.subtitle: Book your free evaluation consultation today. Dr. Alondra Robles will evaluate your case and recommend the best material for your crown.
